## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Logic and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, SEO, and upcoming product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX presented a content strategy with keyword research and competitor analysis in Airtable ContentOS](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Logic team to review and approve content topics by end of week; GrowthX to start with one blog post for calibration](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Discussed CMS options (Sanity, Framer) and potential for interactive content elements](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [Logic planning a product relaunch on October 15th; GrowthX confident in having regular content ready by then](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Keyword Research

  - [GrowthX conducted keyword research based on previously discussed strategy](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Used SEMrush for keyword opportunities and gap analysis against competitors](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [Created Airtable ContentOS with topic clusters, assignments, and keyword data](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Balanced mix of high-level topics, competitive comparisons, and industry-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Aiming for keywords where Logic can rank on page one, while also building topical authority](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Content Approval and Creation Process

  - [Logic team to review and approve topics in Airtable by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [GrowthX to start with one blog post for calibration next week](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Discussed potential for adding interactive elements (e.g., embedded Logic docs) to enhance engagement](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [Aim to have regular content publishing by October 15th for Logic's relaunch](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)

### Website Structure and CMS

  - [Recommendation to separate SEO content (resources/guides) from company news/product announcements](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [Discussed CMS options: Sanity and Framer mentioned as popular choices](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [For initial posts, Logic may use static routes while finalizing CMS decision](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)

### Product Relaunch and PR

  - [Logic planning a relaunch on October 15th with updated website, pricing, and Product Hunt launch](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Discussed importance of having blog content ready for the relaunch](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
  - [Aim to get product announcement picked up by tech outlets for backlinks (e.g., TechCrunch)](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Logic team to review and approve content topics in Airtable by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [GrowthX to create first blog post for review next week](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Logic to decide on CMS and set up basic blog structure](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [GrowthX to aim for multiple blog posts ready by October 15th relaunch](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
  - [Logic to handle initial LinkedIn posting in-house; revisit GrowthX assistance in phase two](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [Both teams to consider additional strategies for maximizing impact of October 15th relaunch](https://fathom.video/share/LFfVyjpNrNMezSH_bcqQj1LXsLnwyysz?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
